productDisplayName: Asics Women Gel Technology Active Black White Pink Shoe
description: CompositionBlack, white and pink trainers made of synthetic leather and mesh uppers, GEL® technology, compression molded EVA and rubber outsoleWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drier Avoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in sunlight FittingRegular Made for that comfortable running experience, these synthetic leather shoes from asics have GEL Cushioning system that protects the feet from impact. The compression moulded EVA ensures longer durability while the suede and upper mesh allow the feet to breathe free as long as you wear them. Perfect for walking and cross training.
